arts.ttl: Luton Town fan's million step challenge as he walks to football grounds across the country for charity
arts.sum: A lifelong Luton Town fan is back with more fundraising activities as he embarks on a million-step challenge: walking to football grounds across England for charity.

arts.ttl: Former Millwall and AFC Wimbledon loanee makes Wrexham move
arts.sum: Wrexham have signed ex-Millwall and AFC Wimbledon loanee Ryan Longman for an undisclosed fee from Championship side Hull. Longman made 36 appearances for Millwall, scoring three times and picking up the same number of assists.
